actions.emptyHint: Add at least one item before sending.
actions.savingHint: Saving changes… Send unlocks when everything is saved.
actions.savingTitle: Saving your changes — Send unlocks when everything is saved.

sendConfirm.message: We'll email this proposal to {{orgName}} and mark it Sent — {{amount}} due on acceptance. This can't be undone.
sendConfirm.messagePlaceholder: Include a short note — it appears in the email above the accept link.
sendConfirm.paymentEnabled: Online payment is enabled — the customer can pay by card after accepting.
sendConfirm.paymentNoteNoStripe: When the customer accepts, they won't have an online payment option. Connect Stripe in Settings → Integrations to offer one.
sendConfirm.paymentWarningDeposit: This proposal asks for a deposit, but customers can't pay online yet — connect Stripe in Settings → Integrations so the deposit can be collected on acceptance.
sendConfirm.recipientRequired: Enter at least one recipient to send.
sendConfirm.title: Send this proposal?
sendConfirm.zeroTotalWarning: This quote totals $0.00 — check that its items are priced before sending.

sendEmailWarning.noBillingContact: Proposal marked Sent, but no email was delivered — {{orgName}} has no billing contact email. Add one in the organization settings, or share the accept link manually.
sendEmailWarning.noEmailService: Proposal marked Sent, but no email was delivered — email is not configured on this server.
sendEmailWarning.pdfRenderFailed: Proposal marked Sent, but the PDF could not be generated, so no email was delivered. Check the attached contract files, then resend.
sendEmailWarning.sendFailed: Proposal marked Sent, but the email could not be delivered. Check the address and try sharing the accept link manually.

actions.sendScheduled: Sending to {{orgName}} in 30 seconds — you can still undo.
actions.sendSuccess: Proposal sent — we'll mark it Viewed and Accepted as {{orgName}} opens and signs.
actions.undoSuccess: Send canceled — the quote is still a draft.
actions.undoTooLate: Too late to undo — the proposal was already sent.

defaults.aiStyleHelp: Shapes how “Auto-fill from web” and “Polish with AI” write product names and descriptions on quotes, invoices, and catalog items. Leave blank for the default format.
defaults.aiStylePlaceholder: Default: the item name is a short, generic customer-friendly name ("Wireless Access Point"); the description starts with the full product name, then bullet-point specs precise enough to verify an order against. Describe your own style here to override it.
defaults.autoTaxHardwareHelp: Newly imported hardware defaults to taxable.
defaults.description: Currency, tax, numbering, and terms applied to new quotes and invoices across your customers.
defaults.markupHelp: Default markup over distributor cost, used to pre-fill the sell price when importing catalog items. The resulting gross margin is shown as you import.
defaults.title: Billing defaults
